scripts.build:package: pnpm --filter @upupjs/core run build && pnpm --filter @upupjs/server run build && pnpm --filter @upupjs/react run build && pnpm --filter @upupjs/vue run build && pnpm --filter @upupjs/svelte run build && pnpm --filter @upupjs/vanilla run build && pnpm --filter @upupjs/angular run build && pnpm --filter @upupjs/preact run build && pnpm --filter @upupjs/next run build
scripts.dev: dotenv -e local-dev/.env.ports -- concurrently "pnpm run dev:apps" "pnpm run dev:package-watch"
scripts.dev:storybook: concurrently "pnpm --filter @upupjs/storybook-vue storybook" "pnpm --filter @upupjs/storybook-react storybook" "pnpm --filter @upupjs/storybook-svelte storybook" "pnpm --filter @upupjs/storybook-vanilla storybook" "pnpm --filter @upupjs/storybook-angular storybook" "pnpm --filter @upupjs/storybook-preact storybook"
scripts.dev:package-watch: pnpm --filter @upupjs/core run build && concurrently "pnpm --filter @upupjs/core run dev" "pnpm --filter @upupjs/server run dev" "pnpm --filter @upupjs/react run dev"
scripts.start: pnpm run docs:build && pnpm --filter @upupjs/landing run start
scripts.e2e: turbo run build && pnpm --filter @upupjs/e2e-test test:e2e && dotenv -e local-dev/.env.minio -- pnpm --filter @upupjs/e2e-test test:e2e:cf
scripts.e2e:minio:up: dotenv -e local-dev/.env.minio -- node scripts/validate-env.mjs && dotenv -e local-dev/.env.minio -- docker compose up -d
scripts.e2e:minio:test: dotenv -e local-dev/.env.minio -- pnpm --filter @upupjs/server exec vitest run tests/integration
scripts.drive:sandbox:test: pnpm --filter @upupjs/core build && dotenv -e local-dev/.env.test -- pnpm --filter @upupjs/server exec vitest run tests/integration/drive-clients-live.integration.test.ts
scripts.drive:sandbox: pnpm --filter @upupjs/core build && pnpm --filter @upupjs/server build && dotenv -e local-dev/.env.test -- node scripts/drive-sandbox/rotate-and-test.mjs
